title: Verilog2001 style parameters
body:
The following does not appear to be supported:

```systemverilog
module foo #(parameter int W) (input [W-1:0] x,
			       output logic [W-1:0] y);
   always_comb
     y = ~x;

endmodule // foo
```
Unfortunately, I have a relatively large codebase that makes use of this idiom. Is there a workaround for it?
